message:
test(runtime_compat): migrate 20+ tests to runtime-agnostic harness

Convert all #[tokio::test] async fn tests to #[test] fn using
asupersync::test_utils::run_test(|| async { ... }) wrapper. This
enables the same test code to run against both tokio and asupersync
runtimes without duplication.

Affected tests cover: Mutex, RwLock, Semaphore, MPSC, Watch,
Broadcast, Timeout, Sleep edge cases. No logic changes — pure
structural migration for runtime abstraction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
